summary: A website with a welcome gate — a button labeled 'Welcome Cutee' must be clicked before the main website content is accessible.

existing_features.title: Add a full-screen welcome gate that appears before any website content is visible. The gate must display a single button labeled 'Welcome Cutee'. Only after the user clicks this button should the main website content (LoveLetterPage) become visible. The gate should fill the entire viewport with a visually matching dark/romantic background consistent with the existing theme, and the button should be styled to match the gold/maroon romantic aesthetic defined in the project.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a gate button labeled 'Welcome Cutee' that must be clicked before the website content is accessible
